author: anon-59ff128d
content: Plan: Convert run_file_mode, run_json_mode, run_pipe_mode, run_script_mode to return Result<(), i32> (exit code). Move all process::exit calls to main(). handle_undo and handle_undo_list also need conversion. This ensures RAII cleanup (undo log saves, temp file destructors) runs on every exit path.
